svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1.2" border="30"> <diagram name="VinoBuzz Architecture" id="F7VvMHqhZWtTwJayJPeA"> <mxGraphModel dx="1141" dy="771" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="Recommendation system Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="560" x="280" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-2" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.general.person2;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="User" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="60" x="50" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="Next.js 14
:3000" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="220" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="FastAPI
:8000" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="420" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Slot Extractor
LangChain + GPT-4o-mini" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="540" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-6" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="is_ready?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="130" x="630" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;" value="Follow-up Chain
(ask missing slot)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="650" y="525" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="SQL Filter
filter_wines(slots)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="940" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Recommender Chain
LangChain + GPT-4o-mini" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="820" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-10" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.flowchart.stored_data;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Redis
Session (TTL 30 min)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="280" y="555" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-11" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.flowchart.stored_data;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Supabase (Postgres)
wines table" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="820" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-12" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="{ reply, slots, recommendations }" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="200" x="155" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-13" edge="1" parent="1" source="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fixDash=0;flowAnimation=1;" target="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-3" value="message"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-14" edge="1" parent="1" source="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;flowAnimation=1;" target="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-4" value="POST /api/chat
(rewrite)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-15" edge="1" parent="1" source="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;flowAnimation=1;" target="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-5" value="user message"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-16" edge="1" parent="1" source="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;flowAnimation=1;" target="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-6" value="SlotState"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-17" edge="1" parent="1" source="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;flowAnimation=1;" target="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-7" value="no"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-18" edge="1" parent="1" source="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;flowAnimation=1;" target="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-8" value="yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-19" edge="1" parent="1" source="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-8" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;flowAnimation=1;" target="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-11" value="query"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-20" edge="1" parent="1" source="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;flowAnimation=1;" target="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-9" value="top 5 wines"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-21" edge="1" parent="1" source="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-9" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;flowAnimation=1;shadow=0;" target="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-4" value="reply + cards"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-22" edge="1" parent="1" source="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;flowAnimation=1;" target="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-4" value="follow-up reply"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-23" edge="1" parent="1" source="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;startArrow=block;startFill=1;endFill=1;flowAnimation=1;" target="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-10" value="load / save session"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-24" edge="1" parent="1" source="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;flowAnimation=1;" target="VXI78VPyt6ViJEP_3sO5-3" value="JSON response"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="485" y="440" /> <mxPoint x="265" y="440" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
